## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Test
- [ ] CI / infrastructure

## Finance impact

Describe affected data sources, rules, metrics, dashboards, or reconciliation logic.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Local checks passed
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No secrets or private data included

## Notes

Add context, limitations, or follow-up work.
